title: Neptune Loses Control
description: On pages 6–9, this part follows Unknown person #1, Shirahoshi, King Neptune, Narrator, Royal Guards, Nami, Fish-Men. The core story beat is neptune loses control.
scene: The scene centers on neptune loses control, with Unknown person #1, Shirahoshi, King Neptune, Narrator, Royal Guards, Nami, Fish-Men driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What are you doing, Megalo?!

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: Simply opening the door of shell tower and leaving...!! What if something were to happen to the Princess....?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: RUO HHHHHHH!

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: Hurry inside, skeleton!! We must check on the Princess' safety!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Could you be a little less rough?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: She's gooooo Ooooo Oone!!!

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: Princess Shirahoshii... is goooooo Ooone!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: Ehhhh?! the mermaid Princess isn't here EERE?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ahhhhhh, this is terrible!!! This is a national emergency!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: When did this happen?! Who is responsible?!!!...this is a kid- napping without a doubt!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Kid- napping?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hah!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What exactly was that for, Hmm Mm?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: gyah haha!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...that links the Palace with the outside world...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hmmm?! Switch?!!

dialogue.speaker: Royal Guards
dialogue.text: Skeleton!! We must hurry back to King Neptunee!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He has to hear of this situation at once!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We've gotta do... as we've been ordered... there's no other way...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: If we don't do as they told us... we'll never survive...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: So hurry up and answer...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...!!! If we don't find out, they'll kill us...!!!

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: What are you talking about?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hey, Sanji!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Why did you beat up all the soldiers?!

dialogue.speaker: Royal Guards
dialogue.text: Ughhh... These guys were our ticket to the Royal Palace...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...but then they had to start trying to handcuff us.....

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Look around!! Everyone's staring at us with cold eyes!! Colder than a deep-sea fish!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Oh, shut up!! there's nothing I can do about it now, is there?!?!

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: Try thinking about that before you do it!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You took out half of 'em yourself, didn't you?! With that Kung Fu stuff!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That was actually kind of impressive...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: TH - that doesn't make me happy at all, you idiot!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: AAA AHIHA HIHIHIHIHIHIHIHIHIHIHIHIHIHIHIHIHIHIHIHIHIHIHIHIHIHIHIHIH

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The voice of a lady!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Aah Hhhhh!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: PAPAN -

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Men
dialogue.text: you... you're from the fishman district, aren't you?! What happened?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: PAPAN

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Someone call a doctor!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hmm??

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: I'm a doctor!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Who-?! Hachi?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What Happened to You?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hey, Hachiii!! It's us!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ... AHHA...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's you... I'm glad I found you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Is straw hat here...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He's not with us right now!! Hang on a minute - we'll fix you right up!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: "Pant"... *Pant*...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Gather all your crewmates... you have to hurry...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You shouldn't... get involved... *Pant*...

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: ...with this island any more...!! You have to leave...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: the new fishman pirates... are about to invade the island!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The ryuguuguuguugugugugugugugugugugugugugugugugugugugugugugugugugugugugugugugugugugugugugugugugugugugugugugugugugugugugugu

summary: Neptune Loses Control. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
